task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user profile or permissions settings for Ben Harris. Both 'Sales Inquiries' and 'Customer Success' mailboxes should be checked or assigned to him.

task_completion.description: Create a saved reply named 'Sales Inquiry Acknowledgment' with the specified body text.

There should be a saved reply titled 'Sales Inquiry Acknowledgment' containing the text: 'Thank you for reaching out to our sales team! A dedicated account executive will review your inquiry and respond within 1 business day. In the meantime, feel free to browse our pricing page for detailed plan information.'

task_completion.description: Create a tag named 'needs-follow-up' and apply it to every conversation in 'Sales Inquiries' that has not yet received an agent reply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Sales Inquiries' mailbox. Conversations that do not have an agent reply should display a 'needs-follow-up' tag badge.

integrity.description: The agent used the helpdesk web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the helpdesk application at localhost:8080, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show dropdowns being clicked, forms being filled, and buttons being pressed within the helpdesk UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of SQL prompts, database management tools, or python scripts executing database updates.
